message:
perf(core,cache): increase cache capacities, add CompiledPattern::cached(), fix invalidation

Increase pattern cache from 256 to 4096 and agent name normalization
cache from 128 to 8192 to reduce recompilation in hot paths. Add
CompiledPattern::cached() for thread-local cache access and remove
expensive LRU reorder-on-hit. Fix cache invalidation to accept an
optional agent ID so the by-id index is always cleaned up even when
the by-key entry was already evicted. Fix drain_touches_scoped to
clear has_pending flag optimistically before the loop to avoid missed
wakeups. Clean up temp files on rename failure in config envfile writer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
